title: Tableau Performance Tuning: Building Dashboards That Load in Under 2 Seconds
summary: Learn how to diagnose and optimize slow Tableau dashboards using Performance Recording, Hyper extracts, filter optimization, LOD expressions, and dashboard design best practices.
overview: This article covers the principles of diagnosing and fixing slow Tableau workbooks. You will learn to use Tableau Performance Recording to isolate rendering vs. query bottlenecks and apply concrete design adjustments to load dashboards under 2 seconds.
topics: Data Source Extract vs Live Strategies
Custom SQL vs Semantic Layer Calculations

title: SQL Performance Optimization
summary: Tuning stored procedures, window functions, indices, and execution plans for large scale Oracle and PostgreSQL transaction tables.
overview: A developer handbook on identifying database bottlenecks and refactoring queries. Learn to read execution plans, build indexing strategies, write efficient stored procedures, and configure materialized views.

title: Enterprise Row Level Security
summary: Implement secure dynamic row level security (RLS) configurations using database entitlement joins and Active Directory mapping.
overview: Learn how to enforce data entitlements at scale. This article outlines the architecture of dynamic RLS in BI, detailing how to join transaction tables to security mapping tables and apply filters using system usernames.

title: Athena Query Optimization
summary: Optimize serverless queries over AWS S3 data lakes using partition pruning, columnar Parquet formats, and cost-reduction techniques.
overview: This article demonstrates how to optimize Amazon Athena queries to achieve sub-second dashboard rendering times. It explains the mechanics of partition pruning, file merging, and query caching to save up to 90% in query costs.

title: AI in Tableau
summary: Integrate LLMs, vector database APIs, and python models natively into Tableau worksheets and dashboards using TabPy.
overview: This case study details how to embed Large Language Models into Tableau dashboards. You will learn to deploy custom Python web services, load TabPy on the server, and write dashboard expressions to call generative API endpoints on user actions.
topics: Writing Tableau calculated scripts using TabPy
Caching TabPy returns for quick loading

title: Building Tableau Extensions
summary: Create custom interactive dashboard components, date selectors, and write-back forms using HTML5 and the Tableau Extensions API.
overview: Learn how to write custom dashboard widgets. This tutorial walks through setting up the manifest (.trex) file, listening to workbook filter events, and writing back parameter adjustments to Tableau via JavaScript.
topics: UI styling with CSS and grid alignment

title: Dashboard Design Best Practices
summary: Master visual hierarchy, color theory, spacing, and cognitive load reduction principles for enterprise business dashboards.
overview: This guide outlines the UX principles required to build business dashboards that CXOs can read in under 5 seconds. We cover grid layouts, layout container hierarchy, and intentional color mapping for actionable reporting.

title: Tableau Server Administration
summary: Configure, secure, monitor, and scale enterprise Tableau Server environments, workgroup databases, and backgrounder schedules.
overview: An in-depth manual on configuring and scaling a multi-node Tableau Server topology. We cover permission mapping, licensing optimizations, backup procedures, and backgrounder process scheduling to ensure high uptime.
topics: Permission mapping and user security profiles

title: Window Functions Deep Dive
summary: Master complex analytical SQL window functions for cohort analysis, running totals, rankings, and lead/lag calculations.
overview: This guide provides practical examples of SQL window functions. You will learn to use PARTITION BY, ORDER BY, and frame clauses (ROWS BETWEEN) to compute complex rolling metrics and historical trends without self-joins.
topics: PARTITION BY and ORDER BY syntax

title: AWS Analytics Architecture
summary: Architect modern data lake solutions using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and Tableau Cloud to process and visualize petabyte scale data.
overview: A blueprint for building a secure and cost-efficient cloud analytics platform. We explore ingestion patterns, ETL automation with Glue and Step Functions, security settings, and live BI querying.
topics: S3 Data Lake Landing, Raw, and Curated layers

title: Prompt Engineering for BI
summary: Master prompt engineering templates and context injection styles to build AI-assisted SQL query generators and BI chatbots.
overview: A guide on formatting prompts to generate clean database queries and analytics. We explore few-shot learning templates, schema injection, formatting constraints, and self-correction loops.
topics: SQL generation safety and formatting constraints

title: Enterprise Dashboard Governance
summary: Implement dashboard lifecycle management, automated QA checks, certification badges, and metadata audits at scale.
overview: This article outlines a framework for dashboard governance in enterprise business units. We cover QA check-lists, peer-review cycles, certification indicators, and catalog indexing.
topics: Automated QA and data validation check-lists
Metadata Auditing using Tableau REST API

title: Analytics Engineering Best Practices
summary: Implement software engineering practices in analytics: version control, dbt modeling, testing, documentation, and CI/CD.
overview: A look into analytics engineering best practices. We explore how to manage SQL transformations using version control, build structured staging and core models in dbt, write automated tests, and run deployment pipelines.
topics: Automated testing for nulls and uniques

title: Modern BI Architecture
summary: Design scalable BI stacks combining cloud warehouses, semantic layers, semantic models, and visual engines for self-service.
overview: This article details how to architect a modern self-service BI system. We analyze the roles of cloud warehouses (BigQuery/Snowflake), semantic definition layers, data transformation tools, and Tableau/Power BI.
topics: Semantic modeling structures for rapid queries

title: Databricks ETL Pipelines
summary: Build high performance batch and streaming ETL pipelines inside Databricks using PySpark, Delta Lake, and Auto Loader.
overview: Learn how to write scalable ETL workflows in PySpark. We cover reading files with Auto Loader, applying schema validation, writing to Delta tables with ACID guarantees, and scheduling workflows.
